opening_line: Hotline? There's a man outside my door. He won't leave. He has no face. Please—I'm not—this isn't a prank.

questions.label: Ask location
questions.response: Fourth floor, east wing. Outside 4B. He's just standing there.

questions.label: Ask appearance
questions.response: Tall. Dark coat. When he turned—I swear there's nothing where a face should be.

questions.label: Ask timeline
questions.response: Maybe ten minutes. Maybe longer. The clock in the hall is wrong again.

questions.label: Request camera check
questions.response: You have cameras, don't you? Look. Please look before you tell me I'm imagining it.
